TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Ging adingu ťäÄť≠ā == kakamuenŚäáśÉÖŚ§ßÁ∂Ī Ci-hu zitay nu amahedek, panganganan u "tapuku tademaw" "„Āā„Āĺ„āď„Ā®", nu caay kaw kakatinengan nu tapukuwan bunac a nipidebungan, tademaw atu tapukuwan a tademaw nika malepacaw tu nikabakuhac, hatidaay tu nu sikakapetan nanay a tademaw atu makayay nu duma a binacadan nu masakaputay milabu malepacaw. ci Mu-hu makatapal tu hatidaay nu icelang nina Ten-zen, baung satu, ales han tu nida ku sakapet, masasulit atu Ten-zen tu kiyaku, hang satu pacumud tu nu henian. satu pabeli tu " sapialesen tu takini'" a cudadan, sisa mapawan tu kina idaway nu sisakapetay a tademaw hicaen hakiya nu udip a milalebu. namakayda, ci Mu-hu lawaen ni Te-hu, mala "putiangan", hida satu a inayi' ku laheci, masakaputay atu makatalay hida satu a malawlaw ku balucu'. . mahiniay a zitayan, cacay u miliwanay tu kakapetan nanay nu tatamaan ci Pan-ten-in-se atu cabay ci Ce'-cun-sin-pa, Sen-le idaw ku nipisiwbayan nu heni tu Wan-se-u, idaw ku nisepian tu sademiad sananay nu lipahakay a nikaudipan. . nipiadih tu kitakid šłĖÁēĆŤßÄ nikuda nina ka kungkuan itida i nipatidengan i Dipun nu Cin-hu-mu-hu nidudan tu nu Cin-hu-cen, itini i kakungkuan u "Ta- Cin-hu", u namakaydaay i tapukuwan nu bunacan a tademaw " Ten-zen" "„Āā„Āĺ„āď„Ā®" anikabahal sananay a tahekalay, miyiwkiw tu Dipun mibuhat tu kanatal, sisa ci Cin-hu kasenun satu mala aydaay a bunacan nu nayi' ay nisimsiman a kitakidan. "Ta-cin-hu" taneng a hidaen a musakamu, cacayay namaka Cin-hu-mu-hu kasenus sa taydan i bunabunacan nu zitay a Tu-kiwan, sisa itini i sabaw siwa nu secian nu Dipun a kakalingatuan, mipulung tu tusa a bataan nu aydaay nu zitayan, atu anuayaw nu mahicahicaay a kulikulitan nu nisimsiman, mala micidekay nu kawawan. duma satu nipicumudan ni Ten-zen tatenga milihida tu tayaay nu likisian ci De-cun-mu-hu nani sawacuan nu hekalay a nipidebungan nu micaliw tina kawawan tu sapadeng nu imian. . itini i " Gin adingu" nu Ta-cin-hu kitakidan, nikaitida sa i Cin-hu a makaadih tu dikuc nu Dipun, makaaidh tu mapungecay nu bukes a tatamaan, saysayen tu daw-ten-cu nu tataynaan nu bukesan, tanayu'ay nu kilang a nisangaan tu luma', sisakapetay tu katini'an, pana' a tademaw, u sapihemhem a zitay nu gagikian a micidekay nu hekahekalan, malecad a tahekal ku muo-ten-ta-luo, tilibi, tennaw, kadideng, dingwa aydaay a keci, atu tapukuan bunac a tademaw, mibahelay tayda i tapukuwan nu balungan, atu nisangaan tu tademaw atu kakatahekalan tu kitidaday nu sasimsimen nanay gikian. ina ka kungkuan caay ka tahekal kina Min-ce-wi-si nu sin-cen'-cun. ni De-cun-mu-hu a kawawan, tatengan ci Mu-hu sakakaay u sasalamaan ni "Ten-zen" " hekalay bunac tademaw" ku misalamaay ci nidaan, tawyaay nu sinikapetan nanay a tademaw mahida u mahedekay nu likisian, kenisan u midiputay tu Mu-hu nu icelangay, atu mibelinay tu Mu-hu nu makaiay tu kaput nu cekun. Śú®"ťäÄť≠ā" . sakay hekal a nicudadan Ś§ĖŚā≥šĹúŚďĀ tulu mihcaan z kaputan Ging walu singsi "„Āē„āď„Ā≠„āď„āļ„ā£„Éľ„Āź„ĀŅ „Āé„āď„ĀĪ„Ā°„Āõ„āď„Āõ„ĀĄ" 3ŚĻīZÁŹ≠ťäÄŚÖęŤÄĀŚłę Ging adingu tulu mihcaan z kaputan Ging walu singsi ťäÄť≠ā 3ŚĻīZÁŹ≠ťäÄŚÖęŤÄĀŚłę "Ging adingu tulu mihcaan z kaputan Ging walu singsi" milawilaway tu Dipun cen-ci cacudadan nu gagikian " tulu mihcaan B kaput Cin-pa singsi", naitida tu i " ce'-wan JUMP" kina tusa a tahekal. ci Ging nikasidikucan " Ging pa singsi" simigani, sidikuc tu salengacay a dikucan, inuayaw nu takal a pasubana' mitabaku tu, u nayi'ay a imin ku sasakamuen. itini i mutiyungay nu gikian ci Ging walu singsi caay kaw tabaku ku tabakuan u piyang ku mulmulen. amilik ku nipinacnac ni Ging walu singsi tu piyeng sisa siwacah kiya laway. tahekalay nu kaputan nu "Ging adigu" a tademaw " Sin-walu, Sen-le', A-meawm, Cin-ten, Tu-hun, Cung-ten, Kuy, Cen-ku-cun tademawan", mikuliay a tadeamaw u duma a tademawan " Ye-yun, Cin-cen, Pa-lang wina". "3ŚĻīZ "3ŚĻīBÁĶĄťáĎŚÖęŤÄĀŚłę",śõĺŚú®"ŤĶ§šłłJUMP" . kin adingu ťáĎť≠ā ci Pan-ten-in-se masumad lukuten nida ku bekes malakimkimkiman nu malukutay nu bukesan, u dikuc nu kulitan atu ci In-se masasubelis, kapah ku wayway, kanamuhan nu misalukiyaway a tademaw pangangan han " Pan-ten-cin-se" nu tatamaan. nika hidasa, u cabay ni In-se namin, inayi' tu namin i tangah nida, ci Pan-ten-cin-se tu. tatusa kina caayay kapawan ci nidaan. makayda ni sakamuan ni Siaw-yi sisa matineng, hina lakalak mukan tu pah ci In-se. nika mahiniay a kikayan milawpes tu punu' nu katuuday mipawan ci In-sean. sisa mangalay miala tu aenengan nu cu-ciaw, ci In-se aci kin-se malingatu a malepacaw. sadikuday mapahemek ni In-se, paytem satu a taluma' patideng. kakungkuan ŚäáśÉÖ De-cun-mu-hu nu pihedekan, namaka tapukuan nanay nu tademaw tasasa, ci Cin-hu u nuheni tu ku kuwanan nu heni. tunikaydaan, ina tenzen wenmin tada malahat tu, nu matatungduhay nu lumaan, sidingkiay nu kadideng atu dingdingwa mamin nima i patiyamay. mahini ku aydaay a tukay, kalasiyansiyanan nanay, nika icelang ku udip, si pakuntaway nu udipan ci Pan-ten-in-se, misiwbay tu sapatudutan a kawaw nu luma'an. itini i kaidawan tu duhepicay nu Ce-cun-sin-pa aci Ye-tu-cu nu maudipay henay midatukay tu nipilawaan, ina luma' yadah ku lawilaw atu kalibutan nu dimiadan. kasikawawan mahicaay nu kawawan, ci In-se mapati'ti' i pungkan tahekal tu aydaay nu limaay nu kitakidan. inu ayawan nanay nida a tahekalay u sibaydukay nu " salengacay nu nipitupelisan" nanitupelisan mahida tu u nikaiyan nu luma'an. pakuyuc ku binacadan tanu adada'sa nu imelang, milawilaway nu tademaw mikiyaku pasayda i sihu patideng tu sapihantay tu patay, mapatay nu lawilaw ku syakay. i mahini, ahicanan naca sa ci In-se taydan nida kina tatusaay nu masakapahay, cacay han u tanektekay nu malakapahay a masakapahay nu simigamiay nu siningan, cacay han idaw ku nipiladay tu tabakiay nu salengacay nu wacuan bangcal ku nikasidikuc nayi' ku aykiway nu bangcalay a tatayna, alaw u balakiay tu ku nuheni ci Sin-pa aci Sen-le'!caay palutatengan ci In-hu, alaw itini i mata nida idaw ku nipikihulan tu ngangan nida i lunem! namahica tu limaay a mihcaan nu kawawan? ahicaen a misumad kina i nayi'ay nu Ging sean, du'ut sa atu kakatalawan nu kakataynian? ? katahekalan nu tademaw ÁôĽŚ†īŤßíŤČ≤ nu hicanan hakiya a icelangan tengtengen patayda i nayi'ay nu limaay a mihcaan nu kitakidan, makaadih tu nalimaay nu mihcaan a nikapatayan, kabiyalawan sa maala nu limaay a mihcaan ci Sin walu aci Sen-le', itida i pahikukian makaadih tu limaay a mihcaan nu udipan, sa matineng tu kakawaw, itida i sabaw lima nu mihcaan namidemec tu kawaw nu di'tu' malalid tu salengacay, hida satu mala di'tu, mademec tu nu udip, naayaway aku mutikuaca taluma tu sabaw lima nu mihcaan, atu wanseu a tademawan midemec tu di'tuan. . sasakamuen ÁĒ®Ť™ě tatelungan kina Cin-hu sapatahekal i kitakid nu sapipatay tu tademaw a baydukan, caay ka tinengi ku bayduk atu kalalidan, limaay a mihcaan sa ina kitakid malawpes tu. malaliday i tini i pakiw nu buladan mapatay tu, hamin nu udiudipan salengac satu ku bukes lawpes ku lumeniay hida satu a salengac, nu caayay ka lalid a tademaw yada tu amin a milaliw, nu siidaay a tademaw idaw ku lahici a milaliw, u pakuyucay satu ku itiniay, babalaki ci nida tu ku maudipay ci nida tu ku mipatayay, sisa ina kitakid tulu a pasintu ku mapatayay, sepat a tademaw taydan i dumaan nu bunacan malimad nu kabiyalawan, mahida milecaday tu di'tu "mitimaay". .
S.PHON: == giŇč adiŇču ** == kakamu…ôn**** ¶i-ńßu zitaj nu amańß…ôd…ôk, paŇčaŇčanan u "tapuku tad…ômaw" "****", nu ¶aaj kaw kakatin…ôŇčan nu tapukuwan buna ¶ a nipid…ôbuŇčan, tad…ômaw atu tapukuwan a tad…ômaw nika mar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw tu nikabakuńßa ¶, ńßatidaaj tu nu sikakap…ôtan nanaj a tad…ômaw atu makajaj nu duma a bina ¶adan nu masakaputaj mir~…ĺabu mar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw. ¶i mu-ńßu makatapar~…ĺ tu ńßatidaaj nu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč nina t…ôn-z…ôn, bauŇč satu, ar~…ĺ…ôs ńßan tu nida ku sakap…ôt, masasur~…ĺit atu t…ôn-z…ôn tu kijaku, ńßaŇč satu pa ¶umud tu nu ńß…ônian. satu pab…ôr~…ĺi tu " sapiar~…ĺ…ôs…ôn tu takini Ē~ °" a ¶udadan, sisa mapawan tu kina idawaj nu sisakap…ôtaj a tad…ômaw ńßi ¶a…ôn ńßakija nu udip a mir~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôbu. namakajda, ¶i mu-ńßu r~…ĺawa…ôn ni t…ô-ńßu, mar~…ĺa "putiaŇčan", ńßida satu a inaji Ē~ ° ku r~…ĺańß…ô ¶i, masakaputaj atu makatar~…ĺaj ńßida satu a mar~…ĺawr~…ĺaw ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °. . mańßiniaj a zitajan, ¶a ¶aj u mir~…ĺiwanaj tu kakap…ôtan nanaj nu tatamaan ¶i pan-t…ôn-in-s…ô atu ¶abaj ¶i ¶…ô Ē~ °- ¶un-sin-pa, s…ôn-r~…ĺ…ô idaw ku nipisiwbajan nu ńß…ôni tu wan-s…ô-u, idaw ku nis…ôpian tu sad…ômiad sananaj nu r~…ĺipańßakaj a nikaudipan. . nipiadińß tu kitakid *** nikuda nina ka kuŇčkuan itida i nipatid…ôŇčan i dipun nu ¶in-ńßu-mu-ńßu nidudan tu nu ¶in-ńßu- ¶…ôn, itini i kakuŇčkuan u "ta- ¶in-ńßu", u namakajdaaj i tapukuwan nu buna ¶an a tad…ômaw " t…ôn-z…ôn" "****" anikabańßar~…ĺ sananaj a tańß…ôkar~…ĺaj, mijiwkiw tu dipun mibuńßat tu kanatar~…ĺ, sisa ¶i ¶in-ńßu kas…ônun satu mar~…ĺa ajdaaj a buna ¶an nu naji Ē~ ° aj nisimsiman a kitakidan. "ta- ¶in-ńßu" tan…ôŇč a ńßida…ôn a musakamu, ¶a ¶ajaj namaka ¶in-ńßu-mu-ńßu kas…ônus sa tajdan i bunabuna ¶an nu zitaj a tu-kiwan, sisa itini i sabaw siwa nu s…ô ¶ian nu dipun a kakar~…ĺiŇčatuan, mipur~…ĺuŇč tu tusa a bataan nu ajdaaj nu zitajan, atu anuajaw nu mańßi ¶ańßi ¶aaj a kur~…ĺikur~…ĺitan nu nisimsiman, mar~…ĺa mi ¶id…ôkaj nu kawawan. duma satu nipi ¶umudan ni t…ôn-z…ôn tat…ôŇča mir~…ĺińßida tu tajaaj nu r~…ĺikisian ¶i d…ô- ¶un-mu-ńßu nani sawa ¶uan nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj a nipid…ôbuŇčan nu mi ¶ar~…ĺiw tina kawawan tu sapad…ôŇč nu imian. . itini i " gin adiŇču" nu ta- ¶in-ńßu kitakidan, nikaitida sa i ¶in-ńßu a makaadińß tu diku ¶ nu dipun, makaaidńß tu mapuŇč…ô ¶aj nu buk…ôs a tatamaan, sajsaj…ôn tu daw-t…ôn- ¶u nu tatajnaan nu buk…ôsan, tanaju Ē~ °aj nu kir~…ĺaŇč a nisaŇčaan tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, sisakap…ôtaj tu katini Ē~ °an, pana Ē~ ° a tad…ômaw, u sapińß…ômńß…ôm a zitaj nu gagikian a mi ¶id…ôkaj nu ńß…ôkańß…ôkar~…ĺan, mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a tańß…ôkar~…ĺ ku muo-t…ôn-ta-r~…ĺuo, tir~…ĺibi, t…ônnaw, kadid…ôŇč, diŇčwa ajdaaj a k…ô ¶i, atu tapukuan buna ¶ a tad…ômaw, mibańß…ôr~…ĺaj tajda i tapukuwan nu bar~…ĺuŇčan, atu nisaŇčaan tu tad…ômaw atu kakatańß…ôkar~…ĺan tu kitidadaj nu sasimsim…ôn nanaj gikian. ina ka kuŇčkuan ¶aaj ka tańß…ôkar~…ĺ kina min- ¶…ô-wi-si nu sin- ¶…ôn Ē~ °- ¶un. ni d…ô- ¶un-mu-ńßu a kawawan, tat…ôŇčan ¶i mu-ńßu sakakaaj u sasar~…ĺamaan ni "t…ôn-z…ôn" " ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj buna ¶ tad…ômaw" ku misar~…ĺamaaj ¶i nidaan, tawjaaj nu sinikap…ôtan nanaj a tad…ômaw mańßida u mańß…ôd…ôkaj nu r~…ĺikisian, k…ônisan u midiputaj tu mu-ńßu nu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj, atu mib…ôr~…ĺinaj tu mu-ńßu nu makaiaj tu kaput nu ¶…ôkun. *"**" . sakaj ńß…ôkar~…ĺ a ni ¶udadan **** tur~…ĺu mińß ¶aan z kaputan giŇč war~…ĺu siŇčsi "********* ********" **z***** giŇč adiŇču tur~…ĺu mińß ¶aan z kaputan giŇč war~…ĺu siŇčsi ** **z***** "giŇč adiŇču tur~…ĺu mińß ¶aan z kaputan giŇč war~…ĺu siŇčsi" mir~…ĺawir~…ĺawaj tu dipun ¶…ôn- ¶i ¶a ¶udadan nu gagikian " tur~…ĺu mińß ¶aan b kaput ¶in-pa siŇčsi", naitida tu i " ¶…ô Ē~ °-wan *ump" kina tusa a tańß…ôkar~…ĺ. ¶i giŇč nikasidiku ¶an " giŇč pa siŇčsi" simigani, sidiku ¶ tu sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj a diku ¶an, inuajaw nu takar~…ĺ a pasubana Ē~ ° mitabaku tu, u naji Ē~ °aj a imin ku sasakamu…ôn. itini i mutijuŇčaj nu gikian ¶i giŇč war~…ĺu siŇčsi ¶aaj kaw tabaku ku tabakuan u pijaŇč ku mur~…ĺmur~…ĺ…ôn. amir~…ĺik ku nipina ¶na ¶ ni giŇč war~…ĺu siŇčsi tu pij…ôŇč sisa siwa ¶ańß kija r~…ĺawaj. tańß…ôkar~…ĺaj nu kaputan nu "giŇč adigu" a tad…ômaw " sin-war~…ĺu, s…ôn-r~…ĺ…ô Ē~ °, a-m…ôawm, ¶in-t…ôn, tu-ńßun, ¶uŇč-t…ôn, kuj, ¶…ôn-ku- ¶un tad…ômawan", mikur~…ĺiaj a tad…ôamaw u duma a tad…ômawan " j…ô-jun, ¶in- ¶…ôn, pa-r~…ĺaŇč wina". "**z "**b*****",**"***ump" . kin adiŇču ** ¶i pan-t…ôn-in-s…ô masumad r~…ĺukut…ôn nida ku b…ôk…ôs mar~…ĺakimkimkiman nu mar~…ĺukutaj nu buk…ôsan, u diku ¶ nu kur~…ĺitan atu ¶i in-s…ô masasub…ôr~…ĺis, kapańß ku wajwaj, kanamuńßan nu misar~…ĺukijawaj a tad…ômaw paŇčaŇčan ńßan " pan-t…ôn- ¶in-s…ô" nu tatamaan. nika ńßidasa, u ¶abaj ni in-s…ô namin, inaji Ē~ ° tu namin i taŇčańß nida, ¶i pan-t…ôn- ¶in-s…ô tu. tatusa kina ¶aajaj kapawan ¶i nidaan. makajda ni sakamuan ni siaw-ji sisa matin…ôŇč, ńßina r~…ĺakar~…ĺak mukan tu pańß ¶i in-s…ô. nika mańßiniaj a kikajan mir~…ĺawp…ôs tu punu Ē~ ° nu katuudaj mipawan ¶i in-s…ôan. sisa maŇčar~…ĺaj miar~…ĺa tu a…ôn…ôŇčan nu ¶u- ¶iaw, ¶i in-s…ô a ¶i kin-s…ô mar~…ĺiŇčatu a mar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw. sadikudaj mapańß…ôm…ôk ni in-s…ô, pajt…ôm satu a tar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° patid…ôŇč. kakuŇčkuan ** d…ô- ¶un-mu-ńßu nu pińß…ôd…ôkan, namaka tapukuan nanaj nu tad…ômaw tasasa, ¶i ¶in-ńßu u nuńß…ôni tu ku kuwanan nu ńß…ôni. tunikajdaan, ina t…ônz…ôn w…ônmin tada mar~…ĺańßat tu, nu matatuŇčduńßaj nu r~…ĺumaan, sidiŇčkiaj nu kadid…ôŇč atu diŇčdiŇčwa mamin nima i patijamaj. mańßini ku ajdaaj a tukaj, kar~…ĺasijansijanan nanaj, nika i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč ku udip, si pakuntawaj nu udipan ¶i pan-t…ôn-in-s…ô, misiwbaj tu sapatudutan a kawaw nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °an. itini i kaidawan tu duńß…ôpi ¶aj nu ¶…ô- ¶un-sin-pa a ¶i j…ô-tu- ¶u nu maudipaj ńß…ônaj midatukaj tu nipir~…ĺawaan, ina r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° jadańß ku r~…ĺawir~…ĺaw atu kar~…ĺibutan nu dimiadan. kasikawawan mańßi ¶aaj nu kawawan, ¶i in-s…ô mapati Ē~ °ti Ē~ ° i puŇčkan tańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu ajdaaj nu r~…ĺimaaj nu kitakidan. inu ajawan nanaj nida a tańß…ôkar~…ĺaj u sibajdukaj nu " sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj nu nipitup…ôr~…ĺisan" nanitup…ôr~…ĺisan mańßida tu u nikaijan nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °an. pakuju ¶ ku bina ¶adan tanu adada Ē~ °sa nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč, mir~…ĺawir~…ĺawaj nu tad…ômaw mikijaku pasajda i sińßu patid…ôŇč tu sapińßantaj tu pataj, mapataj nu r~…ĺawir~…ĺaw ku sjakaj. i mańßini, ańßi ¶anan na ¶a sa ¶i in-s…ô tajdan nida kina tatusaaj nu masakapańßaj, ¶a ¶aj ńßan u tan…ôkt…ôkaj nu mar~…ĺakapańßaj a masakapańßaj nu simigamiaj nu siniŇčan, ¶a ¶aj ńßan idaw ku nipir~…ĺadaj tu tabakiaj nu sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj nu wa ¶uan baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ ku nikasidiku ¶ naji Ē~ ° ku ajkiwaj nu baŇč ¶ar~…ĺaj a tatajna, ar~…ĺaw u bar~…ĺakiaj tu ku nuńß…ôni ¶i sin-pa a ¶i s…ôn-r~…ĺ…ô Ē~ °! ¶aaj par~…ĺutat…ôŇčan ¶i in-ńßu, ar~…ĺaw itini i mata nida idaw ku nipikińßur~…ĺan tu ŇčaŇčan nida i r~…ĺun…ôm! namańßi ¶a tu r~…ĺimaaj a mińß ¶aan nu kawawan? ańßi ¶a…ôn a misumad kina i naji Ē~ °aj nu giŇč s…ôan, du Ē~ °ut sa atu kakatar~…ĺawan nu kakatajnian? ? katańß…ôkar~…ĺan nu tad…ômaw **** nu ńßi ¶anan ńßakija a i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčan t…ôŇčt…ôŇč…ôn patajda i naji Ē~ °aj nu r~…ĺimaaj a mińß ¶aan nu kitakidan, makaadińß tu nar~…ĺimaaj nu mińß ¶aan a nikapatajan, kabijar~…ĺawan sa maar~…ĺa nu r~…ĺimaaj a mińß ¶aan ¶i sin war~…ĺu a ¶i s…ôn-r~…ĺ…ô Ē~ °, itida i pańßikukian makaadińß tu r~…ĺimaaj a mińß ¶aan nu udipan, sa matin…ôŇč tu kakawaw, itida i sabaw r~…ĺima nu mińß ¶aan namid…ôm…ô ¶ tu kawaw nu di Ē~ °tu Ē~ ° mar~…ĺar~…ĺid tu sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj, ńßida satu mar~…ĺa di Ē~ °tu, mad…ôm…ô ¶ tu nu udip, naajawaj aku mutikua ¶a tar~…ĺuma tu sabaw r~…ĺima nu mińß ¶aan, atu wans…ôu a tad…ômawan mid…ôm…ô ¶ tu di Ē~ °tuan. . sasakamu…ôn ** tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan kina ¶in-ńßu sapatańß…ôkar~…ĺ i kitakid nu sapipataj tu tad…ômaw a bajdukan, ¶aaj ka tin…ôŇči ku bajduk atu kar~…ĺar~…ĺidan, r~…ĺimaaj a mińß ¶aan sa ina kitakid mar~…ĺawp…ôs tu. mar~…ĺar~…ĺidaj i tini i pakiw nu bur~…ĺadan mapataj tu, ńßamin nu udiudipan sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶ satu ku buk…ôs r~…ĺawp…ôs ku r~…ĺum…ôniaj ńßida satu a sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶, nu ¶aajaj ka r~…ĺar~…ĺid a tad…ômaw jada tu amin a mir~…ĺar~…ĺiw, nu siidaaj a tad…ômaw idaw ku r~…ĺańßi ¶i a mir~…ĺar~…ĺiw, u pakuju ¶aj satu ku itiniaj, babar~…ĺaki ¶i nida tu ku maudipaj ¶i nida tu ku mipatajaj, sisa ina kitakid tur~…ĺu a pasintu ku mapatajaj, s…ôpat a tad…ômaw tajdan i dumaan nu buna ¶an mar~…ĺimad nu kabijar~…ĺawan, mańßida mir~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj tu di Ē~ °tu "mitimaaj". .
S.FORM: == Ging adingu ťäÄť≠ā == kakamuenŚäáśÉÖŚ§ßÁ∂Ī Ci-hu zitay nu amahedek, panganganan u "tapuku tademaw" "„Āā„Āĺ„āď„Ā®", nu caay kaw kakatinengan nu tapukuwan bunac a nipidebungan, tademaw atu tapukuwan a tademaw nika malepacaw tu nikabakuhac, hatidaay tu nu sikakapetan nanay a tademaw atu makayay nu duma a binacadan nu masakaputay milabu malepacaw. ci Mu-hu makatapal tu hatidaay nu icelang nina Ten-zen, baung satu, ales han tu nida ku sakapet, masasulit atu Ten-zen tu kiyaku, hang satu pacumud tu nu henian. satu pabeli tu " sapialesen tu takini'" a cudadan, sisa mapawan tu kina idaway nu sisakapetay a tademaw hicaen hakiya nu udip a milalebu. namakayda, ci Mu-hu lawaen ni Te-hu, mala "putiangan", hida satu a inayi' ku laheci, masakaputay atu makatalay hida satu a malawlaw ku balucu'. . mahiniay a zitayan, cacay u miliwanay tu kakapetan nanay nu tatamaan ci Pan-ten-in-se atu cabay ci Ce'-cun-sin-pa, Sen-le idaw ku nipisiwbayan nu heni tu Wan-se-u, idaw ku nisepian tu sademiad sananay nu lipahakay a nikaudipan. . nipiadih tu kitakid šłĖÁēĆŤßÄ nikuda nina ka kungkuan itida i nipatidengan i Dipun nu Cin-hu-mu-hu nidudan tu nu Cin-hu-cen, itini i kakungkuan u "Ta- Cin-hu", u namakaydaay i tapukuwan nu bunacan a tademaw " Ten-zen" "„Āā„Āĺ„āď„Ā®" anikabahal sananay a tahekalay, miyiwkiw tu Dipun mibuhat tu kanatal, sisa ci Cin-hu kasenun satu mala aydaay a bunacan nu nayi' ay nisimsiman a kitakidan. "Ta-cin-hu" taneng a hidaen a musakamu, cacayay namaka Cin-hu-mu-hu kasenus sa taydan i bunabunacan nu zitay a Tu-kiwan, sisa itini i sabaw siwa nu secian nu Dipun a kakalingatuan, mipulung tu tusa a bataan nu aydaay nu zitayan, atu anuayaw nu mahicahicaay a kulikulitan nu nisimsiman, mala micidekay nu kawawan. duma satu nipicumudan ni Ten-zen tatenga milihida tu tayaay nu likisian ci De-cun-mu-hu nani sawacuan nu hekalay a nipidebungan nu micaliw tina kawawan tu sapadeng nu imian. . itini i " Gin adingu" nu Ta-cin-hu kitakidan, nikaitida sa i Cin-hu a makaadih tu dikuc nu Dipun, makaaidh tu mapungecay nu bukes a tatamaan, saysayen tu daw-ten-cu nu tataynaan nu bukesan, tanayu'ay nu kilang a nisangaan tu luma', sisakapetay tu katini'an, pana' a tademaw, u sapihemhem a zitay nu gagikian a micidekay nu hekahekalan, malecad a tahekal ku muo-ten-ta-luo, tilibi, tennaw, kadideng, dingwa aydaay a keci, atu tapukuan bunac a tademaw, mibahelay tayda i tapukuwan nu balungan, atu nisangaan tu tademaw atu kakatahekalan tu kitidaday nu sasimsimen nanay gikian. ina ka kungkuan caay ka tahekal kina Min-ce-wi-si nu sin-cen'-cun. ni De-cun-mu-hu a kawawan, tatengan ci Mu-hu sakakaay u sasalamaan ni "Ten-zen" " hekalay bunac tademaw" ku misalamaay ci nidaan, tawyaay nu sinikapetan nanay a tademaw mahida u mahedekay nu likisian, kenisan u midiputay tu Mu-hu nu icelangay, atu mibelinay tu Mu-hu nu makaiay tu kaput nu cekun. Śú®"ťäÄť≠ā" . sakay hekal a nicudadan Ś§ĖŚā≥šĹúŚďĀ tulu mihcaan z kaputan Ging walu singsi "„Āē„āď„Ā≠„āď„āļ„ā£„Éľ„Āź„ĀŅ „Āé„āď„ĀĪ„Ā°„Āõ„āď„Āõ„ĀĄ" 3ŚĻīZÁŹ≠ťäÄŚÖęŤÄĀŚłę Ging adingu tulu mihcaan z kaputan Ging walu singsi ťäÄť≠ā 3ŚĻīZÁŹ≠ťäÄŚÖęŤÄĀŚłę "Ging adingu tulu mihcaan z kaputan Ging walu singsi" milawilaway tu Dipun cen-ci cacudadan nu gagikian " tulu mihcaan B kaput Cin-pa singsi", naitida tu i " ce'-wan JUMP" kina tusa a tahekal. ci Ging nikasidikucan " Ging pa singsi" simigani, sidikuc tu salengacay a dikucan, inuayaw nu takal a pasubana' mitabaku tu, u nayi'ay a imin ku sasakamuen. itini i mutiyungay nu gikian ci Ging walu singsi caay kaw tabaku ku tabakuan u piyang ku mulmulen. amilik ku nipinacnac ni Ging walu singsi tu piyeng sisa siwacah kiya laway. tahekalay nu kaputan nu "Ging adigu" a tademaw " Sin-walu, Sen-le', A-meawm, Cin-ten, Tu-hun, Cung-ten, Kuy, Cen-ku-cun tademawan", mikuliay a tadeamaw u duma a tademawan " Ye-yun, Cin-cen, Pa-lang wina". "3ŚĻīZ "3ŚĻīBÁĶĄťáĎŚÖęŤÄĀŚłę",śõĺŚú®"ŤĶ§šłłJUMP" . kin adingu ťáĎť≠ā ci Pan-ten-in-se masumad lukuten nida ku bekes malakimkimkiman nu malukutay nu bukesan, u dikuc nu kulitan atu ci In-se masasubelis, kapah ku wayway, kanamuhan nu misalukiyaway a tademaw pangangan han " Pan-ten-cin-se" nu tatamaan. nika hidasa, u cabay ni In-se namin, inayi' tu namin i tangah nida, ci Pan-ten-cin-se tu. tatusa kina caayay kapawan ci nidaan. makayda ni sakamuan ni Siaw-yi sisa matineng, hina lakalak mukan tu pah ci In-se. nika mahiniay a kikayan milawpes tu punu' nu katuuday mipawan ci In-sean. sisa mangalay miala tu aenengan nu cu-ciaw, ci In-se aci kin-se malingatu a malepacaw. sadikuday mapahemek ni In-se, paytem satu a taluma' patideng. kakungkuan ŚäáśÉÖ De-cun-mu-hu nu pihedekan, namaka tapukuan nanay nu tademaw tasasa, ci Cin-hu u nuheni tu ku kuwanan nu heni. tunikaydaan, ina tenzen wenmin tada malahat tu, nu matatungduhay nu lumaan, sidingkiay nu kadideng atu dingdingwa mamin nima i patiyamay. mahini ku aydaay a tukay, kalasiyansiyanan nanay, nika icelang ku udip, si pakuntaway nu udipan ci Pan-ten-in-se, misiwbay tu sapatudutan a kawaw nu luma'an. itini i kaidawan tu duhepicay nu Ce-cun-sin-pa aci Ye-tu-cu nu maudipay henay midatukay tu nipilawaan, ina luma' yadah ku lawilaw atu kalibutan nu dimiadan. kasikawawan mahicaay nu kawawan, ci In-se mapati'ti' i pungkan tahekal tu aydaay nu limaay nu kitakidan. inu ayawan nanay nida a tahekalay u sibaydukay nu " salengacay nu nipitupelisan" nanitupelisan mahida tu u nikaiyan nu luma'an. pakuyuc ku binacadan tanu adada'sa nu imelang, milawilaway nu tademaw mikiyaku pasayda i sihu patideng tu sapihantay tu patay, mapatay nu lawilaw ku syakay. i mahini, ahicanan naca sa ci In-se taydan nida kina tatusaay nu masakapahay, cacay han u tanektekay nu malakapahay a masakapahay nu simigamiay nu siningan, cacay han idaw ku nipiladay tu tabakiay nu salengacay nu wacuan bangcal ku nikasidikuc nayi' ku aykiway nu bangcalay a tatayna, alaw u balakiay tu ku nuheni ci Sin-pa aci Sen-le'!caay palutatengan ci In-hu, alaw itini i mata nida idaw ku nipikihulan tu ngangan nida i lunem! namahica tu limaay a mihcaan nu kawawan? ahicaen a misumad kina i nayi'ay nu Ging sean, du'ut sa atu kakatalawan nu kakataynian? ? katahekalan nu tademaw ÁôĽŚ†īŤßíŤČ≤ nu hicanan hakiya a icelangan tengtengen patayda i nayi'ay nu limaay a mihcaan nu kitakidan, makaadih tu nalimaay nu mihcaan a nikapatayan, kabiyalawan sa maala nu limaay a mihcaan ci Sin walu aci Sen-le', itida i pahikukian makaadih tu limaay a mihcaan nu udipan, sa matineng tu kakawaw, itida i sabaw lima nu mihcaan namidemec tu kawaw nu di'tu' malalid tu salengacay, hida satu mala di'tu, mademec tu nu udip, naayaway aku mutikuaca taluma tu sabaw lima nu mihcaan, atu wanseu a tademawan midemec tu di'tuan. . sasakamuen ÁĒ®Ť™ě tatelungan kina Cin-hu sapatahekal i kitakid nu sapipatay tu tademaw a baydukan, caay ka tinengi ku bayduk atu kalalidan, limaay a mihcaan sa ina kitakid malawpes tu. malaliday i tini i pakiw nu buladan mapatay tu, hamin nu udiudipan salengac satu ku bukes lawpes ku lumeniay hida satu a salengac, nu caayay ka lalid a tademaw yada tu amin a milaliw, nu siidaay a tademaw idaw ku lahici a milaliw, u pakuyucay satu ku itiniay, babalaki ci nida tu ku maudipay ci nida tu ku mipatayay, sisa ina kitakid tulu a pasintu ku mapatayay, sepat a tademaw taydan i dumaan nu bunacan malimad nu kabiyalawan, mahida milecaday tu di'tu "mitimaay". .
S.PHON: == giŇč adiŇču ** == kakamu…ôn**** ¶i-ńßu zitaj nu amańß…ôd…ôk, paŇčaŇčanan u "tapuku tad…ômaw" "****", nu ¶aaj kaw kakatin…ôŇčan nu tapukuwan buna ¶ a nipid…ôbuŇčan, tad…ômaw atu tapukuwan a tad…ômaw nika mar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw tu nikabakuńßa ¶, ńßatidaaj tu nu sikakap…ôtan nanaj a tad…ômaw atu makajaj nu duma a bina ¶adan nu masakaputaj mir~…ĺabu mar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw. ¶i mu-ńßu makatapar~…ĺ tu ńßatidaaj nu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč nina t…ôn-z…ôn, bauŇč satu, ar~…ĺ…ôs ńßan tu nida ku sakap…ôt, masasur~…ĺit atu t…ôn-z…ôn tu kijaku, ńßaŇč satu pa ¶umud tu nu ńß…ônian. satu pab…ôr~…ĺi tu " sapiar~…ĺ…ôs…ôn tu takini Ē~ °" a ¶udadan, sisa mapawan tu kina idawaj nu sisakap…ôtaj a tad…ômaw ńßi ¶a…ôn ńßakija nu udip a mir~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôbu. namakajda, ¶i mu-ńßu r~…ĺawa…ôn ni t…ô-ńßu, mar~…ĺa "putiaŇčan", ńßida satu a inaji Ē~ ° ku r~…ĺańß…ô ¶i, masakaputaj atu makatar~…ĺaj ńßida satu a mar~…ĺawr~…ĺaw ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °. . mańßiniaj a zitajan, ¶a ¶aj u mir~…ĺiwanaj tu kakap…ôtan nanaj nu tatamaan ¶i pan-t…ôn-in-s…ô atu ¶abaj ¶i ¶…ô Ē~ °- ¶un-sin-pa, s…ôn-r~…ĺ…ô idaw ku nipisiwbajan nu ńß…ôni tu wan-s…ô-u, idaw ku nis…ôpian tu sad…ômiad sananaj nu r~…ĺipańßakaj a nikaudipan. . nipiadińß tu kitakid *** nikuda nina ka kuŇčkuan itida i nipatid…ôŇčan i dipun nu ¶in-ńßu-mu-ńßu nidudan tu nu ¶in-ńßu- ¶…ôn, itini i kakuŇčkuan u "ta- ¶in-ńßu", u namakajdaaj i tapukuwan nu buna ¶an a tad…ômaw " t…ôn-z…ôn" "****" anikabańßar~…ĺ sananaj a tańß…ôkar~…ĺaj, mijiwkiw tu dipun mibuńßat tu kanatar~…ĺ, sisa ¶i ¶in-ńßu kas…ônun satu mar~…ĺa ajdaaj a buna ¶an nu naji Ē~ ° aj nisimsiman a kitakidan. "ta- ¶in-ńßu" tan…ôŇč a ńßida…ôn a musakamu, ¶a ¶ajaj namaka ¶in-ńßu-mu-ńßu kas…ônus sa tajdan i bunabuna ¶an nu zitaj a tu-kiwan, sisa itini i sabaw siwa nu s…ô ¶ian nu dipun a kakar~…ĺiŇčatuan, mipur~…ĺuŇč tu tusa a bataan nu ajdaaj nu zitajan, atu anuajaw nu mańßi ¶ańßi ¶aaj a kur~…ĺikur~…ĺitan nu nisimsiman, mar~…ĺa mi ¶id…ôkaj nu kawawan. duma satu nipi ¶umudan ni t…ôn-z…ôn tat…ôŇča mir~…ĺińßida tu tajaaj nu r~…ĺikisian ¶i d…ô- ¶un-mu-ńßu nani sawa ¶uan nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj a nipid…ôbuŇčan nu mi ¶ar~…ĺiw tina kawawan tu sapad…ôŇč nu imian. . itini i " gin adiŇču" nu ta- ¶in-ńßu kitakidan, nikaitida sa i ¶in-ńßu a makaadińß tu diku ¶ nu dipun, makaaidńß tu mapuŇč…ô ¶aj nu buk…ôs a tatamaan, sajsaj…ôn tu daw-t…ôn- ¶u nu tatajnaan nu buk…ôsan, tanaju Ē~ °aj nu kir~…ĺaŇč a nisaŇčaan tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, sisakap…ôtaj tu katini Ē~ °an, pana Ē~ ° a tad…ômaw, u sapińß…ômńß…ôm a zitaj nu gagikian a mi ¶id…ôkaj nu ńß…ôkańß…ôkar~…ĺan, mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a tańß…ôkar~…ĺ ku muo-t…ôn-ta-r~…ĺuo, tir~…ĺibi, t…ônnaw, kadid…ôŇč, diŇčwa ajdaaj a k…ô ¶i, atu tapukuan buna ¶ a tad…ômaw, mibańß…ôr~…ĺaj tajda i tapukuwan nu bar~…ĺuŇčan, atu nisaŇčaan tu tad…ômaw atu kakatańß…ôkar~…ĺan tu kitidadaj nu sasimsim…ôn nanaj gikian. ina ka kuŇčkuan ¶aaj ka tańß…ôkar~…ĺ kina min- ¶…ô-wi-si nu sin- ¶…ôn Ē~ °- ¶un. ni d…ô- ¶un-mu-ńßu a kawawan, tat…ôŇčan ¶i mu-ńßu sakakaaj u sasar~…ĺamaan ni "t…ôn-z…ôn" " ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj buna ¶ tad…ômaw" ku misar~…ĺamaaj ¶i nidaan, tawjaaj nu sinikap…ôtan nanaj a tad…ômaw mańßida u mańß…ôd…ôkaj nu r~…ĺikisian, k…ônisan u midiputaj tu mu-ńßu nu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj, atu mib…ôr~…ĺinaj tu mu-ńßu nu makaiaj tu kaput nu ¶…ôkun. *"**" . sakaj ńß…ôkar~…ĺ a ni ¶udadan **** tur~…ĺu mińß ¶aan z kaputan giŇč war~…ĺu siŇčsi "********* ********" **z***** giŇč adiŇču tur~…ĺu mińß ¶aan z kaputan giŇč war~…ĺu siŇčsi ** **z***** "giŇč adiŇču tur~…ĺu mińß ¶aan z kaputan giŇč war~…ĺu siŇčsi" mir~…ĺawir~…ĺawaj tu dipun ¶…ôn- ¶i ¶a ¶udadan nu gagikian " tur~…ĺu mińß ¶aan b kaput ¶in-pa siŇčsi", naitida tu i " ¶…ô Ē~ °-wan *ump" kina tusa a tańß…ôkar~…ĺ. ¶i giŇč nikasidiku ¶an " giŇč pa siŇčsi" simigani, sidiku ¶ tu sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj a diku ¶an, inuajaw nu takar~…ĺ a pasubana Ē~ ° mitabaku tu, u naji Ē~ °aj a imin ku sasakamu…ôn. itini i mutijuŇčaj nu gikian ¶i giŇč war~…ĺu siŇčsi ¶aaj kaw tabaku ku tabakuan u pijaŇč ku mur~…ĺmur~…ĺ…ôn. amir~…ĺik ku nipina ¶na ¶ ni giŇč war~…ĺu siŇčsi tu pij…ôŇč sisa siwa ¶ańß kija r~…ĺawaj. tańß…ôkar~…ĺaj nu kaputan nu "giŇč adigu" a tad…ômaw " sin-war~…ĺu, s…ôn-r~…ĺ…ô Ē~ °, a-m…ôawm, ¶in-t…ôn, tu-ńßun, ¶uŇč-t…ôn, kuj, ¶…ôn-ku- ¶un tad…ômawan", mikur~…ĺiaj a tad…ôamaw u duma a tad…ômawan " j…ô-jun, ¶in- ¶…ôn, pa-r~…ĺaŇč wina". "**z "**b*****",**"***ump" . kin adiŇču ** ¶i pan-t…ôn-in-s…ô masumad r~…ĺukut…ôn nida ku b…ôk…ôs mar~…ĺakimkimkiman nu mar~…ĺukutaj nu buk…ôsan, u diku ¶ nu kur~…ĺitan atu ¶i in-s…ô masasub…ôr~…ĺis, kapańß ku wajwaj, kanamuńßan nu misar~…ĺukijawaj a tad…ômaw paŇčaŇčan ńßan " pan-t…ôn- ¶in-s…ô" nu tatamaan. nika ńßidasa, u ¶abaj ni in-s…ô namin, inaji Ē~ ° tu namin i taŇčańß nida, ¶i pan-t…ôn- ¶in-s…ô tu. tatusa kina ¶aajaj kapawan ¶i nidaan. makajda ni sakamuan ni siaw-ji sisa matin…ôŇč, ńßina r~…ĺakar~…ĺak mukan tu pańß ¶i in-s…ô. nika mańßiniaj a kikajan mir~…ĺawp…ôs tu punu Ē~ ° nu katuudaj mipawan ¶i in-s…ôan. sisa maŇčar~…ĺaj miar~…ĺa tu a…ôn…ôŇčan nu ¶u- ¶iaw, ¶i in-s…ô a ¶i kin-s…ô mar~…ĺiŇčatu a mar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw. sadikudaj mapańß…ôm…ôk ni in-s…ô, pajt…ôm satu a tar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° patid…ôŇč. kakuŇčkuan ** d…ô- ¶un-mu-ńßu nu pińß…ôd…ôkan, namaka tapukuan nanaj nu tad…ômaw tasasa, ¶i ¶in-ńßu u nuńß…ôni tu ku kuwanan nu ńß…ôni. tunikajdaan, ina t…ônz…ôn w…ônmin tada mar~…ĺańßat tu, nu matatuŇčduńßaj nu r~…ĺumaan, sidiŇčkiaj nu kadid…ôŇč atu diŇčdiŇčwa mamin nima i patijamaj. mańßini ku ajdaaj a tukaj, kar~…ĺasijansijanan nanaj, nika i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč ku udip, si pakuntawaj nu udipan ¶i pan-t…ôn-in-s…ô, misiwbaj tu sapatudutan a kawaw nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °an. itini i kaidawan tu duńß…ôpi ¶aj nu ¶…ô- ¶un-sin-pa a ¶i j…ô-tu- ¶u nu maudipaj ńß…ônaj midatukaj tu nipir~…ĺawaan, ina r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° jadańß ku r~…ĺawir~…ĺaw atu kar~…ĺibutan nu dimiadan. kasikawawan mańßi ¶aaj nu kawawan, ¶i in-s…ô mapati Ē~ °ti Ē~ ° i puŇčkan tańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu ajdaaj nu r~…ĺimaaj nu kitakidan. inu ajawan nanaj nida a tańß…ôkar~…ĺaj u sibajdukaj nu " sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj nu nipitup…ôr~…ĺisan" nanitup…ôr~…ĺisan mańßida tu u nikaijan nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °an. pakuju ¶ ku bina ¶adan tanu adada Ē~ °sa nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč, mir~…ĺawir~…ĺawaj nu tad…ômaw mikijaku pasajda i sińßu patid…ôŇč tu sapińßantaj tu pataj, mapataj nu r~…ĺawir~…ĺaw ku sjakaj. i mańßini, ańßi ¶anan na ¶a sa ¶i in-s…ô tajdan nida kina tatusaaj nu masakapańßaj, ¶a ¶aj ńßan u tan…ôkt…ôkaj nu mar~…ĺakapańßaj a masakapańßaj nu simigamiaj nu siniŇčan, ¶a ¶aj ńßan idaw ku nipir~…ĺadaj tu tabakiaj nu sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj nu wa ¶uan baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ ku nikasidiku ¶ naji Ē~ ° ku ajkiwaj nu baŇč ¶ar~…ĺaj a tatajna, ar~…ĺaw u bar~…ĺakiaj tu ku nuńß…ôni ¶i sin-pa a ¶i s…ôn-r~…ĺ…ô Ē~ °! ¶aaj par~…ĺutat…ôŇčan ¶i in-ńßu, ar~…ĺaw itini i mata nida idaw ku nipikińßur~…ĺan tu ŇčaŇčan nida i r~…ĺun…ôm! namańßi ¶a tu r~…ĺimaaj a mińß ¶aan nu kawawan? ańßi ¶a…ôn a misumad kina i naji Ē~ °aj nu giŇč s…ôan, du Ē~ °ut sa atu kakatar~…ĺawan nu kakatajnian? ? katańß…ôkar~…ĺan nu tad…ômaw **** nu ńßi ¶anan ńßakija a i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčan t…ôŇčt…ôŇč…ôn patajda i naji Ē~ °aj nu r~…ĺimaaj a mińß ¶aan nu kitakidan, makaadińß tu nar~…ĺimaaj nu mińß ¶aan a nikapatajan, kabijar~…ĺawan sa maar~…ĺa nu r~…ĺimaaj a mińß ¶aan ¶i sin war~…ĺu a ¶i s…ôn-r~…ĺ…ô Ē~ °, itida i pańßikukian makaadińß tu r~…ĺimaaj a mińß ¶aan nu udipan, sa matin…ôŇč tu kakawaw, itida i sabaw r~…ĺima nu mińß ¶aan namid…ôm…ô ¶ tu kawaw nu di Ē~ °tu Ē~ ° mar~…ĺar~…ĺid tu sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj, ńßida satu mar~…ĺa di Ē~ °tu, mad…ôm…ô ¶ tu nu udip, naajawaj aku mutikua ¶a tar~…ĺuma tu sabaw r~…ĺima nu mińß ¶aan, atu wans…ôu a tad…ômawan mid…ôm…ô ¶ tu di Ē~ °tuan. . sasakamu…ôn ** tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan kina ¶in-ńßu sapatańß…ôkar~…ĺ i kitakid nu sapipataj tu tad…ômaw a bajdukan, ¶aaj ka tin…ôŇči ku bajduk atu kar~…ĺar~…ĺidan, r~…ĺimaaj a mińß ¶aan sa ina kitakid mar~…ĺawp…ôs tu. mar~…ĺar~…ĺidaj i tini i pakiw nu bur~…ĺadan mapataj tu, ńßamin nu udiudipan sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶ satu ku buk…ôs r~…ĺawp…ôs ku r~…ĺum…ôniaj ńßida satu a sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶, nu ¶aajaj ka r~…ĺar~…ĺid a tad…ômaw jada tu amin a mir~…ĺar~…ĺiw, nu siidaaj a tad…ômaw idaw ku r~…ĺańßi ¶i a mir~…ĺar~…ĺiw, u pakuju ¶aj satu ku itiniaj, babar~…ĺaki ¶i nida tu ku maudipaj ¶i nida tu ku mipatajaj, sisa ina kitakid tur~…ĺu a pasintu ku mapatajaj, s…ôpat a tad…ômaw tajdan i dumaan nu buna ¶an mar~…ĺimad nu kabijar~…ĺawan, mańßida mir~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj tu di Ē~ °tu "mitimaaj". .
